args: $target = '%1'; $script = Join-Path (Get-Location) 'scripts/windows-sign.ps1'; if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $script)) { $script = Join-Path (Get-Location) '../scripts/windows-sign.ps1' }; if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $script)) { throw 'scripts/windows-sign.ps1 not found from Tauri signing command cwd.' }; & $script $target
